title: Lunglei West MLA Pu T. Lalhlimpuia'n Lunglei District Kisan Mela kharna hun a hmanpui
content:
4655/2025-2026

Lunglei, 2026 Ramtuk thla ni 28:Lunglei District Agricultural Technology Management Agency (ATMA) huaihawta Lunglei Agriculture Complex-a ni hnih awh Kut Hna Thawktute Kutpui, "Kisan Mela" buatsaih kharna hun chu vawiin chawhnu khan Lunglei West bialtu MLA Pu T. Lalhlimpuia'n a hmanpui.

Khuallian Pu T. Lalhlimpuia chuan thlawhhma siam leh a kaihhnawihah Lunglei District-in hmasawn theihna (potential) tam tak a nei tih sawiin, chumi chu hmang ṭangkaia sawr chhuak thei turin kut hna thawktute'n kawhhmuh leh kaihhruai an mamawh tih a sawi a. Mizoram sawrkarin Chief Minister kaihhruaina hnuaiah ram hmasawnna tur kalkawng duangin, mi taima tana hlawhtlinna tur a ruahman tih a sawi a. Kut hna thawktute tihhmasawn leh an thar chhuah hmanga ram hmasawnna thlentir chu sawrkarin a tum lian tak a nih thu sawiin, kut hna thawktute chu party induhsakna beisei lo va, taimakna hmanga sawrkar ko eih thei tura hma la turin a chah a. Ram dang nena insumdawn tawnna kawng inhawng turah chhiatpui lova chhawrtu ni turin thiam thil zir leh theihna tihpun zel a pawimawh thu te, intodelh tur leh thawn chhuah tham thar chhuah nei tura hma lak a pawimawh thu te a sawi.

Pu T. Lalhlimpuia chuan Kisan Mela chu thlai thar pho chhuahna chauh ni lovin, huan enkawl dan leh hna thawh dan hriatna tura inkaihhruaina hun ṭha tak a nih thu sawiin, kut hna thawha hmasawn turin ruahmanna fel tak nena hma lak leh tun lai thiamna thar hman ṭangkai thiam a pawimawh thu a sawi a. Thlawhhma aṭanga thar chhuah leh lak luh tipung tur te, a enkawl leh hralhna kawnga awmze nei zawka hma la tur te'n a zau zauva hma lak leh intel khawm thiam a pawimawh thu sawiin, khaw hrang hrangte'n mahni khaw hming chherna tur hma lakna liantham nei zel se ṭha a tih thu a sawi a. Sawrkar department-te leh kut hna thawktute chu Kisan Mela kal tlanga ngaihtuahna thar pu tura chahin, mi thiamte rawn chunga hma la zel turin kut hna thawktute chu a chah.

Lunglei District Agriculture Officer & ATMA Project Director Dr Samuel Lalliansanga chuan Kisan Mela buatsaih chhan sawi fiahin, a hlawhtlin nana tha thawhtu sawrkar hotute, department hrang hrang, kut hna thawktute leh a chhimtu mipuite chungah lawm thu a sawi a. Lunglei District ATMA Deputy Project Director Pu John Laltluangliana chuan report a pe a. Line department aṭangin AH&Vety Joint Director Dr Ngurzidingi Sailo, District Sericulture Officer Pu ZD Zoramthanga, District Horticulture Officer Pu Lalṭhakima, LRS&WC Range Officer Pu H. Lalremruata, District Fisheries Development Officer Pi Christina Lalramchhani leh kut hna thawktu ai awh aṭangin thu sawi ngaihthlak a ni bawk a. Lunglei Assistant District Agriculture Officer Pu K. Lalrinfela'n lawm thu sawiin hun a khar.

ATMA Kisan Mela-ah hian thlai leh thil dang pho chhuahteah intihsiakna siam lovin, department hrang hrang hnuaia kut hna thawktu ṭha thlan chhuahte hnenah "Best Farmer Award" hlan a ni a. Lawmman tur sum hi MLA Pu T. Lalhlimpuia chuan tumin, farmer 12 hnenah farmer pakhat zelah ₹5,000/- leh certificate hlan a ni.

Best Farmer Award dawngtute chu:

(1) Agriculture & Farmers Welfare Department— Pu Rinthanga, Khawmawi (Oil Palm); Pu R. Zoramthanga, Haulawng (Buh) leh Pu Kaphmingthanga, Buarpui (Fu)

(2) Horticulture Department— Pu Lalremsiama, Zawlpui (Nul siam) leh Pu L. Lalrinmawia, Ramthar, Lunglei (Dragon fruit)

(3) Animal Husbandry & Veterinary Department— Pu Pc. Zonunsanga, Zobawk (Bawng vulh) leh Pu C. Lalnghakliana, Venghlun (Vawk vulh)

(4) Land Resources, Soil & Water Conservation Department— Pu P. Lalthansanga, Haulawng (Rubber) leh Pu Lalremruata, Haulawng (Rubber)

(5) Sericulture Department— Pu Lalzarzova, Ṭawipui North-II (Eri pangang khawi) leh Pu Lalduhzuala, Haulawng (Muga pangang khawi)

(6) Fisheries Department— Pu Lalhmunmawia Sailo, Serte (Sangha dil)

February ni 27–28, 2026 chhunga Lunglei District Kisan Mela kalpuiah hian stall 21 awmin, Agriculture, ATMA, Horticulture, AH & Veterinary, Fisheries, Soil & Water Conservation, Sericulture, KVK Lunglei, ICAR, MzSRLM, NEIDA, SELCO Foundation, FSSAI, Jute Corporation of India, Cadbury leh tualchhung mi kut hna thawktu, thil siam chhuaktu leh lo neihna hmanraw zuartute an inpho chhuak a. He Kisan Mela-ah hian kut hna thawktute thil deh chhuah hrang hrang man man zawka lei theiha chhawp chhuah niin, AH & Veterinary Department leh KVK te'n ran leh thlai hriselna dinhmun endikna (Animal & Plant Health Clinic) an buatsaih nghal bawk.

Lunglei District Kisan Mela hi mipuite'n an hlut hle a, ni khatah mi 6,000–7,000 velin an tlawh anga chhinchhiah a ni a. Thlai leh thil thar chhuah hrang hrangte a man tlawma zawrh niin, hemi atan hian kut hna thawktute hnenah support price pek a ni a. Department leh an hnuaia kut hna thawktute stall hawnga an inpho chhuah bakah, thlawhhma enkawl kawnga hriat tur pawimawh hrang hrang (information booklet) siam leh sem a ni bawk a. Animal Health Clinic-ah ran entir 250 vel awmin, ui a hri danna (Anti-Rabies Vaccine) 80 chuang pek a nih bakah, damdawi chi hrang hrang sem a ni a. Stall hrang hranga thlai leh thil pho chhuahte pawh hralh a kal hle bawk a. Kisan Mela puala Farmer–Scientist Interaction Programme buatsaihah mi thiamte'n kut hna thawktute hriat tur pawimawh hrang hrang zirtirin, kut hna thawktute nen an inkawm ho bawk.

Attachment

title: Lunglei HPC Vice Chairman Pu V. Malsawmtluanga'n MUP Zotlang Unit Golden Jubilee lawmna a hmanpui
content:
4654/2025-2026

Lunglei, 2026 Ramtuk thla ni 28:Vawiin khan Lunglei High Powered Committee (HPC) Vice Chairman, Lunglei North bialtu MLA Pu V. Malsawmtluanga chuan Mizo Upa Pawl (MUP) Zotlang Unit (Lunglei) Golden Jubilee lawmna chu Khuallian niin a hmanpui.

Pu R. Lalthangvunga Ina Golden Jubilee lawmna hun hmanah hian Khuallian Pu V. Malsawmtluanga chuan MUP member-te Golden Jubilee chibai bukin, duhsakna a hlan a. Upate zahnaah malsawmna a awm tih sawiin, nu leh pa leh aia upate zahna kawngah ṭhangtharte'n ṭan lak a ngai tih a sawi a. Upate chu chak tawh lo leh kohhran leh khawtlangah pawh ṭangkai tawh lo anga inngai lo tura chahin, tu leh fate leh ram leh hnam tana an hlutna te, an ṭawngṭaina leh thurawnin malsawmna a ken telte hre reng turin a chah a. MLA a nihna zawnah upate tana a tih theih hrang hrangah tlanchhiat a tum loh thu leh an tana din zel a tum thu sawiin, MUP te'n pawl leh member-te tana an mamawhte inthlahrung lova a hnena thlen ṭhin turin a chah a. Upate malsawmna leh ṭawngṭaipuina chu thil thlakhlelhawm leh hlu tak nia a hriat thu sawiin, ram rawngbawl hna ṭha taka a thawh theih nana ṭawngṭaipui zel turin a ngen.

Pu V. Malsawmtluanga chuan Mizoram sawrkarin upate a ngaih pawimawh thu sawiin, upate chhawmdawlna (old age pension) a tihpun bakah, sawrkar laipui aṭanga sum kal a muan ṭhin avangin State sawrkarin lo pek lailawk tur State sum dah turin ruahmanna a siam tih a sawi a. Sawrkarin Zotlang ram chhung Zapui ramah Mizorama Solar Power Plant lian ber tur bun a tum thu sawiin, hei hi a taka kalpui theih a nih chuan Mizoram tana Zotlang khawtlangin a thawh ropui tak leh khawtlang hmasawnna tur a ni dawn tih a sawi a. Khawtlang mipuite thawhpuina leh ṭawiawmna a ngen.

Pu V. Malsawmtluanga hian MUP Zotlang Unit dintu la dam mi 4-te — Pu C. Kapṭhuama (kum 94), Pu JT Kima (kum 92), Pu R. Sumkhuma (kum 88) leh Pu S. Kapkima (kum 87) te chu ngaihhlutna thilpek ₹1,000/- ṭheuh a hlan a. MUP Zotlang Unit te'n Mizoram hmun pawimawh tlawhna tur an dil angin kum thara MLA Fund hmuh hmasak ber aṭangin ruahmanna siam a nih tur thu a sawi.

MUP Zotlang Unit Golden Jubilee lawmnaah hian Lunglei Municipal Council (LMC) Executive Councillor Pi Lalhruaitluangi Sailo chu Khual Zahawm niin, Khual Zahawm hian MUP Ina Golden Jubilee hriat rengna lungphum (monument) chu a hawng thung.

MUP Zotlang Unit Golden Jubilee lawmna hi President Pu R. Lalthangvunga'n a kaihruai a. Kum 2025 January – 2026 February inkara Unit member chatuan ram pan mi 16 te sunna hun hman a ni a. Rev. B. Lalrinawma'n hunserh hmangin, Secretary Pu Zairemthanga Sailo chuan a din tirh aṭanga tun thlenga MUP Zotlang Unit dinhmun tlangpui a tar lang a. Pu Lalchhuanawma Colney chuan hnah tuma kal khawmte awiin, MUP hmingin Unit MUP member nupa tuak 9 hnenah Inneih Golden Jubilee lawmpuina leh nupa tuak 5 hnenah Inneih Silver Jubilee lawmpuina thuziak hlan a ni a. Golden Jubilee pual pawhfuh lawmman sem a ni bawk.

Chawhnu lamah Golden Jubilee lawmna hun hman chhunzawm niin, Khual Zahawm Pi Lalhruaitluangi Sailo chuan thu a sawi bakah, MUP General Headquarters Lunglei hruaitute, Zotlang Local Council, Branch MHIP leh Branch YMA ai awhte'n thu an sawi bawk a. Deborah Ralte chuan zaia kal khawmte awiin, intihhlimna leh infiamna hrang hrang buatsaih a ni a. Assistant Secretary Pu R. Lalduha chuan lawm thu sawiin, tlai lamah Golden Jubilee lawmna chawhlui an kil ho nghal.

Mizo Upa Pawl Zotlang Unit hi March ni 1, 1976 khan din niin, tunah hian member 216 an awm mek a. MUP Zotlang Unit hian kum tin an din champha phak hi ruai nen an lawm ṭhin a. Kumin hian an din ni, March ni 1 chu Pathianni a nih avangin Golden Jubilee hi vawiin khan an lawm a ni.

MUP Zotlang Unit hian an pawl hmingin in (building) ṭha tak mai neiin, tunah hian chhungkaw pakhatin an luah mek a. Member thi an awmin Headquarters tuarpuina lehkha bakah, Unit suma citation siamin, pawisa fai ₹3,000/- nen member thite an inral ṭhin a. Khawtlang thil pawimawh an telna awmah pawl hmingin ṭhahnem ngai takin an thawk chhuak ṭhin bawk.

Attachment

title: CHIEF SECRETARY HOVIN VICE PRESIDENT LO ZIN TUR DAWNSAWN DAN TUR RELIN AN THUKHAWM
content:
4653/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 28th February, 2026:Vawiin khan Pu Khilli Ram Meena, Chief Secretary, Government of Mizoram hovin CS Conference Hall, MINECO-ah March ni 7, 2026-a Mizoram University Convocation vawi 20-na hmanpui tura lo zin tur, Pu C.P. Radhakrishnan, India Vice President lo dawnsawn dan tur relin an thukhawm.

Thutkhawmah hian department hrang hrang inpuahchah dan thlir ho niin, VP lo dawnsawn nana pawimawh turte sawiho a ni a. Pu Sharad Agarwal, DGP; Pu Ravi Horo, Addl. PCCF (P&D); IGP (Crime); Commissioner & Secretary, Health & Family Welfare; Secretary to Governor; Secretary, IPRP&S; DC, Aizawl; SP (Security); SP (Traffic); SP, Aizawl; State Protocol Office; MZU Registrar bakah Civil Hospital Aizawl; Zoram Medical College & Hospital; Directorate of Hospital & Medical Education; Health Services; leh Food & Drugs lam hotute an tel a ni.

title: PRIME MINISTER-IN HMEICHHE TLEIRAWLTE TAN A THLAWNA LAK THEIH TURIN CHHUL HMAWR CANCER THLENTU HPV LAKA INVENNA VACCINE INDIA RAM PUM HUAPIN A TLANGZARH | HEALTH MINISTER PI LALRINPUII’N MIZORAM TAN A TLANGZARH
content:
4652/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 28th February, 2026 :Vawiin khan Prime Minister Pu Narendra Modi chuan chhul hmawr cancer thlentu Human Papilloma Virus (HPV) vaccine chu hmeichhe tleirawl kum 14-na hmang mekte tan sawrkar damdawiin hrang hranga a thlawna lak theih turin India ram pum huapin Ajmer, Rajasthan atangin a tlangzarh a. Health & Family Welfare Department chuan Mizoram tan he vaccine tlangzarhna inkhawm hi Civil Hospital Auditorium-ah buatsaihin, Pi Lalrinpuii, Minister, H&FW Department chuan a tlangzarh a, Pu Khilli Ram Meena, Chief Secretary chuan inkhawm a kaihruai a ni.

Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan thusawiin, kan Prime Minister Pu Narendra Modi-an hmeichhiate hriselna kawnga hmalakna tha tak a siam chu fakawm a tih thu a sawi a. Mizoram chu India state zinga mihring awm zat za zela chhutin cancer vei awm tamna ber a ni chu pawi a tih thu sawiin, Mizo cancer veiten an pan nasat ber pawl Tata Memorial Hospital, Mumbai-a an Director pawhin Mizo zinga cancer vei an tam lutuk a vei thu leh zuk leh hmuam (tobacco products) kan tih nasat avang leh kan nunphung leh kan ei leh in a hrisel tawk loh vang a ni tih a hrilh thu a sawi a. Mithiamten an zirchianna-a an hmuhchhuah danin sarep, vawk thau leh tel tha lo kan ei tam avang leh zuk leh hmuam kan tih nasat avanga cancer vei kan tam thu a tarlang bawk a.

Minister chuan India rama hmeichhia cancer vei zingah hnute cancer a tam bera, chhul hmawr cancer-in a dawt tih a sawi a. Chhul hmawr cancer za zela 99.7% chu HPV-in a thlen thu sawin, HPV laka kan inven theihna tur vaccine a thlawna lak theih tura tlangzarh a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Hmeichhe tleirawl kum 14-na hmang mekte chu he vaccine hi la vek turin a chah a. Directorate atanga Sub-centre thlenga mipuite hriselna tura thawktute chu an inpekna leh thawhrimna fakawm a tih thu sawiin, lawmthu a sawi a ni.

Chief Secretary Pu Khilli Ram Meena pawhin kalkhawmte lawmna thu sawiin, khawvel pum huapa chhul hmawr cancer vei zawng zawng hmun nga-a thena hmun khat chu India ramah an awm thu a sawi a. Hemi avang hian kan thalaite, nakin lawka nu la ni turte tana chhul hmawr cancer laka an invenna tur vaccine a thlawna an la thei tur chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, kan ram tan mellung pawimawh tak a ni a ti a. Mizoram chu India-a chhul hmawr cancer vei tam berna pawl a nih thu leh hmeichhiate zingah he cancer vei leh vei loh enna (screening) ti an tlem thu a tarlang a. He hmalakna pawimawh tak hian nunna a chhan anga, chhungkua a tichak anga, kan ram tan hmasawnna thlentu a ni ang, a ti.

Vawiin inkhawmah hian Prime Minister-in Ajmer, Rajasthan atanga India ram pum huapa HPV vaccine a tlangzarhna online-a thlir ho a ni a. Chumi hnuah State program tan a ni a. Dr. Zoramruati Ralte, Jt Director, EPI hnen atangin HPV vaccine chungchang inhlilhhriatna neih a ni a, Dr. Vanlalfela, Director, Health Services chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

Chhul hmawr cancer hi hmeichhe natna bik a ni a, chhul hmawr cancer za zela 99.7% hi Human Papilloma Virus-in (HPV) a thlen a ni. Kum 2024 khan India ramah chhul hmawr cancer vei thar mi 78,499 an awm a, thi 42,392 an awm bawk.

HPV chi hrang zinga 17-te hi cancer thlentu (high risk) bik ni a hriat a ni a. Heng chi 17 zingah hian HPV 16 hi chhul hmawr cancer thlentu hlauhawm ber zing ami niin, khawvel puma chhul hmawr cancer zinga 77% hi HPV 16 leh HPV 18 inkawp in a thlen a ni a, India ramah chuan chhul hmawr cancer zinga 88% hi he virus hian a thlen a ni. HPV natna hi kawppuite hnenah kaichhawn a awlsam hle a, mipat hmeichhiatna, mipat mipat-na leh oral sex atangin a inkaichhawn theih vek a ni.

Tunah hian khawvel pumah ram 160-ah HPV vaccine hi hman tawh a ni a. South East Asia Region (SEAR) a ram 10 zinga ram 8-ah HPV Vaccine hi hman mek niin, India ramah chuan HPV Vaccine hi private damdawi inah kum 2008 atangin hman tan a ni tawh bawk.

India chhunga HPV vaccine kalpui dan tur:

•Vaccine la thei te: Hmeichhia tleirawl kum 14-na hmang mek (kum 14 pum tawh kum 15 birthday la lawm lo te)

•Vaccine pek dan tur: Quadrivalent Gardasil vaccine hi ban ti hrawlah 0.5ml chiu luh tur a ni.

•Vaccine lak theihna hmun: Sawrkar damdawiin hrang hrang- Health and Wellness Centre-Primary Health Centres (PHC), Community Health Centres (CHCs), Sub-District Hospitals (SDHs), District Hospitals (DHs) ah te pek a ni ang.

•Campaign hun chhung: Thla thum chhungin he vaccine hi pek beihpui thlak phawt tur a ni a, a hnu ah chuan Sub Center-ah vaccine dang pek rual a pek theih tur a ruahman a ni.

HPV Vaccine campaign in a huam lohte:

•Hmeichhia tleirawl natna vei mek emaw natna benvawn nei, enkawl dam a nih hma chu vaccine pek theih an ni lo.

•Vaccine a lak tawhah allergy nei emaw yeast allery nei te pek loh tur.

•Nu naupai mekte pek loh tur a ni

•Campaign danin vaccine la thei tur a a ruahmanna ang a tleirawl hmeichhia kum bihtliah chin kum 14 nilo zawng chu pek loh tur.

HPV Vaccine la tur zawng zawng U-WIN Portal ah in register vek tur a ni a, in register thiam lote chu vaccine lakna tur hmunah puih theih an ni. UWIN portal atang chauhin report pawh pek tur a ni.

Attachment

title: Tourism Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar in Aizawl leh a chhehvela tourist hmun chei that tura ruahmante tlawh
content:
4651/2025-2026

Aizawl, the 28th of February, 2026:Vawiin khan Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar, Minister of State, Tourism Department chuan Aizawl leh a chhehvel - Sakawrhmuituai tlang, Durtlang North, Sakeikhawthlir (Durtlang), Muthi leh Laipuitlang-a tourism hmun cheithat tura ruahmante a tlawh a, khawtlang hruaitute nen inkawmin hmalak dan tur ruahmanna an siam.

Minister hi Tourism Department atangin Director Pi R. Lalrodingi leh officer dang ten an tawiawm a ni.

Tourism Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan Mizoram hmun hrang hranga tourism potential nei tha hmun engemawzatte chu cheitha a, tichangtlun turin ruahmanna a awm tih a sawi a. “Sawrkarin a cheithat dan turah ruahman sa deuh nei mah se, a hrechiangtu khawtlang hruaitute rawtna leh duhdante ngaithla a, a tha thei ang ber nei tura remruat ho turin kan lo kal,” tiin, hmunhmate chu khuarel mawina tichhe lo thei ang bera cheithat tum a nih thu a sawi bawk.

Minister chuan sawi chhunzawmin, “Hmasawnna ruhrel sak engemawzatah, a enkawl leh hman dan turah ruahmanna a awm tha tawk lo a, chuvangin infrastructure tha tak tak pawh enkawltu mumal awm lova țawl chhia a awm thin. Tuna kan project turah hi chuan a sak lai leh enkawl chhunzawm kawngah  khawtlang nen tha taka thawhho kan duh a, ziaka inremna mumal tak neih hmasak kan duh a ni” a ti.

Mizorama tourist site cheithatna tur hian SASCI Part-II, 2025-2026 hnuaia ‘Development of Tourist facilities & attractions to Global Scale in the state of Mizoram’ ah cheng vaibelchhe 250 hmuh tawh a ni a. Hemi hnuaiah hian tourist site hrang hranga hmasawnna ruhrel siam bakah tourist lodge pawimawh bik cheithat te,  wildlife sanctuary beh chhana wildlife tourism kalpui te, water sports adventure hmun tur siam te, paragliding thlawhna tur siamte a tel.

Sports Minister ni bawk Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan Durtlang North leh Durtlanga sports infrastructure sak mek leh ruahmante a tlawh tel bawk.

Attachment

title: Khawzawl District-ah Human Papillomavirus (HPV) Vaccine pekchhuah a ni
content:
4650/2025-2026

Dated Khawzawl, 28th February 2026:Vawiin chawhnu dar 1:00 khan Khawzawl District Hospital-ah Human Papillomavirus (HPV) Vaccine, Gardasil 4, (HPV Type 6, 11, 16, 18) cancer hrang hrang (a bikin Chhul Cancer) laka invenna, single dose chu pekchhuah a ni a, Khawzawl Bawrhsap Pu K. Vanlalthiana'n hawnna hun a hmang.

HPV vaccination Campaign Launching programme hi India ram pumpuiah vawiin khan Prime Minister-in a hawng a ni. Hemi rual hian Khawzawl District pawhin  Vaccine pek hmain inkhawm tawi neih a ni a, Pu Laldinsanga, DPM, CMO Khawzawl in kaihruaiin, Dr. Shahnaz M Zothanzami, Chief Medical Officer-in HPV Vaccine chungchang sawifiahna leh sawi zauna a nei a ni.

Khawzawl District hnuaiah Vaccine pekna tur hmun PHC/CHC/DH (Rabung PHC, Kawlkulh PHC, Khawhai PHC, Sialhawk PHC, Biate CHC leh District Hospital Khawzawl) ah te hian kum 14 atanga kum 15 leh thla thum chinte Vaccine pek an ni a, District Hospital Khawzawl bikah hian Govt. Little Flower School zirlai thlan chhuahte hnenah HPV vaccine single dose hi pek an ni.

Human Papilloma Virus (HPV) Vaccine, Gardasil 4 hi khawvel ram hrang hrang 155-ah pek tawh niin India ram ah pawh vawiin atang hian pek tan a ni. Vaccination campaign hi thla thum (3) chhungin target beneficieries te hnenah pek kim vek theih beisei a ni.

Attachment

title: Serchhip DC Pu Paul L Khuma’n Serchhip Sub-Headquarters YMA Kumpuan Hawnna hun a hmanpui
content:
4649/2025-2026

Dated Serchhip, the 28th February, 2026:Nimin February 27, 2026 zan dar 7 khan Serchhip DC Pu Paul L Khuma chuan Sub-Headquarters YMA, Serchhip buatsaih kumpuan Ruihhlo Do hawnna hun, anmahni Hall-a buatsaih a hmanpui.

DC chuan ruihhlo do kawnga YMA te hmalakna fakin, police te leh excise department te nen tha taka an thawhhona avanga a lawm thu a sawi a. “Kan beih tur hi i hrechiang ang u” tiin ruihhlo do kawnga awmze nei zawka hma la thei tur chuan ruihhlo chu eng nge a nih a, mihringah engtin nge hna a thawh tih kan hriat chian a, kan zirchian a ngai a ni, a ti. Pu Paul L Khuma chuan Serchhip District huap ruihhlo ngai camping hlawhtling taka neih zawh tak chungchang sawiin, YMA te inpekna a fak a. Ruihhlo ngai ten an sim theihna tura tha thlah loa tang zel tur leh, a la ti ve ngai lo ten an tihchhin lohna turin mahni inchhung atanga bul tan theuh turin a sawm bawk a ni.

Additional SP Pu H Lalduata pawhin YMA member ten ruihhlo do kawnga sawt zawka hma an lak theih nan sawrkar dan te leh hriattur pawimawh dangte inhrilhhriatna hun a hmang a ni.

Kumpuan hawnna programme ah hian Serchhip Sub-Headquarters YMA Pu Kawlthuama pawhin fuihna thu a sawi a. Kumpuan Committee Chairman Pu PC Vanlalluna’n programme a kaihruai a. Sub-Headquarters Anti Drug Squad (SADS) Chairman Pu PB Malsawma’n lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: Health Assessment Camp for Persons with Disabilities Held at Tlabung and Tuichawng under Project LEAP
content:
529/2025-2026

Lunglei, 28 February 2026:A Health Assessment Camp for persons with disabilities was organised on February 27, 2026, at Tlabung Sub-Divisional Hospital and Tuichawng under Tlabung RD Block as part of Project LEAP (Lunglei's Empowerment for Access and Equity for All Persons), an initiative undertaken under the leadership of the Deputy Commissioner, Lunglei.

The camp was conducted by a medical team led by Senior Specialist (Orthopedician) Dr Joseph Lalrindika Chawngthu. The team comprised an Audiologist, Clinical Psychologist, Ophthalmic Assistant, members of the NCD Medical Team, officials from the Social Welfare Department, and staff of the Tlabung Sub-Divisional Officer (Civil)/Block Development Office.

Altogether, 82 persons with disabilities from Tlabung, Tuichawng and neighbouring villages attended the camp. In addition to disability assessment, 68 eligible individuals were registered on the Unique Disability ID (UDID) portal to facilitate issuance of UDID cards.

Assistive devices to be provided through the Artificial Limbs Manufacturing Corporation of India (ALIMCO), including wheelchairs, hearing aids, walking sticks, crutches and other necessary aids, were identified and recommended for eligible beneficiaries. Screening for non-communicable diseases (NCDs) and other health conditions was also carried out under the Healthy Lunglei District Campaign.

Attachment
